name: @a5c-ai/agent-mux-webui
description: Browser app for agent-mux gateway control, monitoring, and realtime session-detail flow inspection
author: a5c-ai

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build --workspace=@a5c-ai/agent-mux-ui && vite build && tsc --build && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declarationMap false -p tsconfig.json
scripts.build:realtime: npm run build --workspace=@a5c-ai/agent-catalog && npm run build --workspace=@a5c-ai/agent-comm-mux && npm run build --workspace=@a5c-ai/agent-mux-ui && npm run build
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build:realtime && npm run build --workspace=@a5c-ai/agent-mux-gateway && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run build:realtime && npm run build --workspace=@a5c-ai/agent-mux-gateway && playwright test --config playwright.config.ts --headed
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build:realtime && npm run test && npm run verify:release
